creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sunpoet     2011-06-28 15:53:54 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    russian              Makefile 
  Added files:
    russian/p5-Lingua-DetectCyrillic Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                     pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Add p5-Lingua-DetectCyrillic 0.02
  
  Lingua::DetectCyrillic. The package detects 7 Cyrillic codings as well as the
  language - Russian or Ukrainian. Uses embedded frequency dictionaries; usually
  one word is enough for correct detection.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Lingua-DetectCyrillic/
  
  PR:             ports/157941
  Submitted by:   Dmitry Liakh <dliakh@ukr.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.107     +1 -0      ports/russian/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/russian/p5-Lingua-DetectCyrillic/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/russian/p5-Lingua-DetectCyrillic/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/russian/p5-Lingua-DetectCyrillic/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/russian/p5-Lingua-DetectCyrillic/pkg-plist (new)
